title: ModelParameter
description: Model parameter configuration schema for Foundry Toolkit recipes

name.description: Name of the model parameter configuration

oliveFile.description: Path to the olive json file. Relative to aitk folder, or prefixed with 'o:' for olive examples directory

isLLM.description: Set automatically to true by model ID if the model is an LLM

isIntel.description: Indicates this configuration targets Intel hardware

intelRuntimeValues.description: Subset of Intel device types supported. If omitted, all Intel device types are included.

evalRuntime.description: RuntimeEnum value for evaluation. Used when the template uses CUDA and no runtimeOverwrite is set.

evalNoDataConfig.description: When true, only random data is used for evaluation latency (no data config required)

debugInfo.description: Debug information about special conversion modes (auto-generated by sanitize.py)

isQNNLLM.description: Shortcut for PythonEnvironment + CUDA. Sets up runtimeOverwrite for CUDA EP and others; the previous EP is used for EPContextBinaryGenerator by PythonEnvironment

isGPURequired.description: Set automatically to true when CUDAExecutionProvider is used. Indicates some passes require CUDA and cannot run without GPU.

isGPUSuggested.description: When true, some passes benefit from GPU but can run without it

memoryGbSuggested.description: Suggested free memory in GB to convert the model

needHFLogin.description: When true, a HuggingFace login is required (e.g., set automatically when ModelBuilder pass is used)

runtimeOverwrite.description: Overrides the execution environment runtime settings

executeRuntimeFeatures.description: Additional feature suffixes appended to the execute runtime when resolving requirement files

evaluationRuntimeFeatures.description: Additional feature suffixes appended to the evaluation runtime when resolving requirement files

pyEnvRuntimeFeatures.description: Additional feature suffixes appended to the Python environment runtime when resolving requirement files

addCpu.description: Default is false. When true, the CPU execution provider is added as an additional runtime option alongside the primary EP

epMinVersions.description: Minimum version string requirements keyed by execution provider name

additionalProperties.description: Minimum version string for this execution provider

disableConversionGeneration.description: When true, suppresses automatic generation of the Conversion section by sanitize.py

runtimeInConversion.description: Runtime selection parameter used during conversion phase (auto-generated by sanitize.py)

optimizationPaths.description: Ordered list of paths in the olive json used to compute the optimizationDefault display label

optimizationDefault.description: Auto-computed optimization label derived from optimizationPaths

sections.description: Ordered list of configuration sections. Valid sequences: [Conversion], [Conversion, Quantization], [Conversion, Evaluation], or [Conversion, Quantization, Evaluation]

ParameterDisplayTypeEnum.description: UI widget type for enum parameters

ParameterCheckTypeEnum.description: Condition check type for parameter selectors

ParameterActionTypeEnum.description: Action type applied to the olive json. Update and Insert are both upsert at runtime but validated separately.

ParameterCheck.description: Condition that checks for the presence or absence of a path in the olive json

path.description: Dot-notation path in the olive json to check

ParameterAction.description: An atomic mutation applied to the olive json when a parameter value is selected

path.description: Dot-notation path in the olive json to act on

value.description: Value to write for update/insert actions. Omit for delete actions.

Parameter.description: A single configurable parameter. For bool/enum types use one of: (path), (path + actions), (path + values), (path + values + actions), or (selectors + actions). For int/str types use path only.

autoGenerated.description: Indicates this parameter was auto-generated by sanitize.py and can be ignored when editing manually

name.description: Human-readable display name shown in the UI

description.description: Human-readable description shown in the UI

descriptionLink.description: URL for additional documentation. Requires description to be set.

displayNames.description: UI labels corresponding to each entry in values or selectors. Length must match values/selectors length.

displayType.description: UI widget type for enum parameters (Dropdown or RadioGroup)

path.description: Dot-notation path to the parameter in the olive json

values.description: Allowed values for enum parameters, or the two state values for bool parameters

selectors.description: Advanced selector conditions used to determine the current value of enum or bool parameters

actions.description: Parallel list of action lists, one per value/selector. When empty, the parameter value is upserted at path directly.

readOnly.description: When true, the parameter is displayed but cannot be changed by the user

customize.description: When true, allows users to enter custom values for an enum parameter. Requires enum type with values and no selectors.

fallbackValue.description: Default value used when the path does not exist in the olive json

template.description: Template reference. Either a Parameter object (whose own template field must be a string key) or a string key into the parameter template dictionary.

RuntimeOverwrite.description: Overrides the runtime environment used during execution or evaluation phases

autoGenerated.description: Indicates this was auto-generated by sanitize.py

pyEnvPath.description: Dot-notation path in the olive json to the Python environment path

executeEp.description: Execution provider override for the execute phase. Cannot be set together with executeRequirement.

executeOliveDeviceType.description: Device type override for the execute phase

executeRequirement.description: Requirement override for the execute phase. Format: 'FOLDER/NAME_pyMAJOR.MINOR.PATCH' (e.g. 'acme/runtime_py3.11.0'). Cannot be set together with executeEp.

evaluateUsedInExecute.description: When true, evaluation runs inside the execute environment. Typically used for EP binary generation.

DebugInfo.description: Flags indicating which special pass is used for conversion/quantization. Only one of useModelBuilder, useOpenVINOConversion, useOpenVINOOptimumConversion, or useQuarkQuantization may be set. Auto-generated by sanitize.py.

useModelBuilder.description: Pass key when ModelBuilder is active. Quantization cannot be disabled; conversion outputs a model folder.

useOpenVINOConversion.description: Pass key when OpenVINOConversion is active. Quantization cannot be disabled.

useOpenVINOOptimumConversion.description: Pass key when OpenVINOOptimumConversion is active. Quantization cannot be disabled.

useQuarkQuantization.description: Pass key when QuarkQuantization is active. Quantization cannot be disabled.

OptimizationPath.description: A single olive json path contributing to the optimizationDefault display label

path.description: Dot-notation path in the olive json whose value contributes to the optimization label

name.description: Optional. If provided and present in the OptimizationToDisplayName mapping, maps the value to a display name. If provided but not in the mapping, the value is treated as boolean and the name itself is used as the label.

Section.description: A group of parameters belonging to a single optimization phase

autoGenerated.description: Indicates this section was auto-generated by sanitize.py

name.description: Display name of the section shown in the UI

phase.description: Optimization phase this section belongs to

parameters.description: Ordered list of parameters in this section

disableToggleGeneration.description: When true, suppresses automatic generation of the section toggle parameter by sanitize.py

toggle.description: Bool parameter that enables or disables this entire section. Must use bool type. Auto-generated by sanitize.py if disableToggleGeneration is not set.
